$schema-comment: AI provider registry. Contributors: add a new entry to enable a provider on renown. id = lowercase short tag users type in attestation. displayName = what shows in the UI badge. coauthorQuery = the GitHub commit-search trailer phrase used to backfill attribution_query on attestation. jwksUrl (optional) = where to fetch signing keys from for cryptographic verification; when set, the server pulls keys with jose's createRemoteJWKSet (1h-ish in-process cache) and verifies submitted attestation JWTs against them. Special providers with non-JWKS verifiers (like `dev`, HMAC-based) live in aiProviders.ts as code, not here.
